title: bunium ammoides
intro: Bunium ammoides, also known as Sea Fennel or Wild Fennel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Bunium ammoides is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, used as an infusion, or added to culinary dishes, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects.
